summary: Completed testing of Iteration 18 features: License Registration fix (FormData instead of URLSearchParams), Sidebar rename ('Deposit/Withdrawal'), Simulation dropdown (5 options), Admin Licenses page access. All features working correctly.

Backend Test 2: License invite validation endpoint works ✓
Backend Test 3: License registration with FormData works - no 'Field Required' error ✓
Backend Test 4: Admin licenses endpoint accessible to master admin ✓
Backend Test 5: License invites endpoint accessible to master admin ✓
Backend Test 6: Licensee transactions endpoint accessible to master admin ✓
Backend Test 7: API health check passes ✓
Frontend Test 1: Login as master admin successful ✓
Frontend Test 2: Sidebar shows 'Deposit/Withdrawal' (renamed from 'Licensee Account') ✓
Frontend Test 3: Simulation dropdown shows all 5 options (Member, Basic Admin, Super Admin, Honorary Licensee, Extended Licensee) ✓
Frontend Test 4: Admin Licenses page loads with 'License Management' header ✓
Frontend Test 5: Admin Licenses page has all 3 tabs (License Invites, Active Licenses, Transactions) ✓
Frontend Test 6: License Registration page loads correctly with valid invite code ✓
Frontend Test 7: License Registration page shows Starting Amount without notices below ✓
Frontend Test 8: License Registration form submission works without 'Field Required' error ✓
Frontend Test 9: Registration successful - shows success toast 'Registration successful! Welcome to CrossCurrent!' ✓
critical_code_review_comments: License registration fix correctly uses FormData instead of URLSearchParams in api.js
Backend register-with-license endpoint correctly uses Form(...) parameters
create_token function is correctly named and used (was previously create_access_token)
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from response in register-with-license endpoint
Sidebar correctly renamed 'Licensee Account' to 'Deposit/Withdrawal' in memberNavItems
Simulation dropdown correctly shows 5 options with proper icons and labels
License Registration page has clean UI with no notices below Starting Amount section
seed_data_creation: Created test user via license registration: test_reg_user_playwright@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 18 features are fully implemented and tested: 1) License Registration fix - uses FormData instead of URLSearchParams, create_token function correctly named, _id excluded from response, 2) Sidebar renamed 'Licensee Account' to 'Deposit/Withdrawal', 3) Simulation dropdown shows 5 options (Member, Basic Admin, Super Admin, Honorary Licensee, Extended Licensee), 4) Admin Licenses page accessible to Master Admin only with 3 tabs. The license registration URL format is /register/license/:code (not /register/:code).
